title: Text-only evidence submissions are rejected after being accepted by validation
reasoning: The first guard defines the intended contract as accepting either text or a file, and the evidence JSON stores trimmed text. However, the size guard rejects every request without a file with status 413, so a valid text-only evidence submission can never be pinned.
reproduction: POST multipart form data with only text=example. The request passes the no-content check, then returns 413 because file is null.
recommendation: Only run file size and MIME validation when a file is present, or change the initial contract and error message if files are mandatory.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests were provided for this route, and there is no test asserting text-only evidence behavior.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a route handler test that posts FormData containing text but no file and asserts it pins JSON without attempting pinFileToIPFS.
minimumFixScope: Update frontend/src/app/api/upload-evidence/route.ts validation around the file checks.
